label: Proxy
description: Settings for integrating Frigate behind a reverse proxy that passes authenticated user headers.

header_map.label: Header mapping
header_map.description: Map incoming proxy headers to Frigate user and role fields for proxy-based auth.

user.label: User header
user.description: Header containing the authenticated username provided by the upstream proxy.

role.label: Role header
role.description: Header containing the authenticated user's role or groups from the upstream proxy.

role_map.label: Role mapping
role_map.description: Map upstream group values to Frigate roles (for example map admin groups to the admin role).

logout_url.label: Logout URL
logout_url.description: URL to redirect users to when logging out via the proxy.

auth_secret.label: Proxy secret
auth_secret.description: Optional secret checked against the X-Proxy-Secret header to verify trusted proxies.

default_role.label: Default role
default_role.description: Default role assigned to proxy-authenticated users when no role mapping applies (admin or viewer).

separator.label: Separator character
separator.description: Character used to split multiple values provided in proxy headers.
